response: Veda Hlubinka-Cook was a software programmer at Brøderbund in the 1980s and was the model for one of the characters in Jordan Mechner's game "Prince of Persia." She designed and created the computer game "D/Generation" and was technical director for the computer game "The Last Express." In the 1997 video game *The Last Express*, she was the model for one of the characters, and she contributed to the development of the game.
